About

Who I Am

I'm Sazid Saleem, a passionate software developer from Rajshahi, Bangladesh, specializing in WordPress development, full-stack web applications, and AI-integrated platforms.

I hold a B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering from Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology (KIIT), Bhubaneswar, India — where I also earned a Minor Degree in Financial Economics and an "Study in India" scholarship from India's Ministry of Human Resource and Development.

Outside of client work, I run a self-initiated Digital Skills Empowerment Program to teach web development to rural students and help reduce the digital skill gap in underprivileged communities.

  • Git & GitHub Masterclass – Udemy (2022)
  • Agile Project Management – Coursera (2023)
  • Full Stack Web Development (PHP, Laravel, Vue.js) – Ostad (Ongoing)
  • Cybersecurity Certified
  • Minor Degree in Financial Economics (SPSS) – KIIT University
2020 – 2024
